message.content:
The website section for **TIFINART** (a visual communication and signage company) is structured with multiple distinct areas, each containing specific content, text, images, icons, and interactive elements. Below is a detailed breakdown of every visible element:


### **1. Header Section (Top Banner)**
- **Background Image**: A dark, urban street scene (likely a storefront or signage installation) with partial text visible (e.g., "CBD COFFEE" and "ELECTRONIQUES PUFF CBD").
- **Logo**: Centered at the top, a white rectangular logo with a red triangular icon and the text "TIFINART" in bold red, followed by smaller gray text: "Agence de pub et communication visuelle".
- **Main Heading**: Large white text: "ENSEIGNES, COVERING ET COMMUNICATION VISUELLE À MARSEILLE ET DANS LES BOUCHES-DU-RHÔNE" (Signs, Wraps, and Visual Communication in Marseille and the Bouches-du-Rhône).
- **Subheading**: Smaller white text: "TIFINART conçoit, fabrique et installe des solutions de signalétique pour renforcer la visibilité des commerces et professionnels, avec un rendu durable et soigné" (TIFINART designs, manufactures, and installs signage solutions to enhance the visibility of businesses and professionals, with durable and refined results).
- **Contact Buttons**: Two red-bordered buttons with white text:
  - Left: "07 84 82 71 91" (phone number)
  - Right: "Nous contacter" (Contact Us)
- **Checkmark Icon**: A small white checkmark (✓) below the buttons, possibly indicating a service guarantee or approval.


### **2. "VOTRE PARTENAIRE POUR UNE VISIBILITÉ LOCALE DURABLE" Section**
- **Background**: White with a red header bar.
- **Heading**: Bold red text: "VOTRE PARTENAIRE POUR UNE VISIBILITÉ LOCALE DURABLE" (Your Partner for Sustainable Local Visibility).
- **Subheading**: Smaller gray text: "Des réalisations sur mesure, pensées pour attirer et rassurer" (Custom creations designed to attract and reassure).
- **Body Text**: Multiple paragraphs of gray text explaining TIFINART’s services:
  - "Une façade bien identifiée, un message clair et une identité cohérente font toute la différence. TIFINART vous accompagne de la conception à la pose pour créer une présence visuelle efficace, adaptée à votre activité et à votre environnement. Notre approche privilégie la lisibilité, la qualité des finitions et l’impact, afin que vos supports deviennent de véritables outils de conversion." (A well-identified facade, clear messaging, and consistent identity make all the difference. TIFINART supports you from design to installation to create effective visual presence, tailored to your activity and environment. Our approach prioritizes readability, finish quality, and impact, so your materials become true conversion tools.)
  - "Que vous lanciez votre commerce, modernisez votre devanture ou prépariez un événement, nous vous orientons vers la solution la plus pertinente selon votre budget, vos contraintes et vos objectifs." (Whether you’re launching your business, modernizing your storefront, or preparing an event, we guide you to the most relevant solution based on your budget, constraints, and goals.)
- **Image**: A rectangular image on the right showing a close-up of a sign with a woman’s face and the text "Fashion" (stylized, likely a sample signage project).


### **3. Navigation Menu**
- **Background**: White with a thin gray border.
- **Logo**: Small red "TIFINART" logo on the left.
- **Menu Items** (black text, evenly spaced):
  - Accueil (Home)
  - Enseignes (Signs)
  - Enseigne drapeau (Flag Sign)
  - Promotions
  - Aménagement (Layout/Design)
  - Plaques professionnelles (Professional Plates)
  - Store
  - Covering
  - Contact


### **4. Cookie Consent Banner**
- **Background**: Light gray.
- **Icon**: Small yellow cookie icon (🍪) on the left.
- **Text**: "Ce site utilise des cookies et vous donne le contrôle sur ce que vous souhaitez accepter" (This site uses cookies and gives you control over what you wish to accept).
- **Buttons**:
  - Green: "Tout accepter" (Accept All)
  - Red: "Tout refuser" (Refuse All)
  - Gray: "Personnaliser" (Personalize)
- **Close Icon**: Red "X" button on the top-right corner of the banner.


### **5. Google Reviews Section**
- **Background**: White.
- **Header**: "Google Avis" (Google Reviews) in blue text, with a 5.0-star rating (★★★★★) and "(34)" (number of reviews) in gray.
- **Button**: Red button: "Laissez-nous un avis sur Google" (Leave us a review on Google).
- **Review Cards** (4 visible, each with):
  - **Reviewer Info**: Name (e.g., "alain fuste", "Alpha Urgenc...", "you lori", "A. HENNI") and a small profile icon.
  - **Rating**: 5 stars (★★★★★) in yellow.
  - **Review Snippet**: Short text (e.g., "Super accueil très bon travail et très réactif, projet d’habillage d’un...", "J’avais besoin en urgence d’un marquage adhésif sur mon véhicule...", "On a eu l’occasion de travailler avec l’équipe TIFINART pour...", "Excellent travail réalisé avec soin, les techniciens sont très...").
  - **"Lire la suite" Link**: Red text link to read full review.
- **Pagination Dots**: Small gray dots below the reviews (indicating more reviews exist).


### **6. Footer Sections**
The footer is divided into three main parts: a red bar, a pink bar, and a dark gray bar, followed by a white section with contact info and links.

#### **a. Red Bar (Top Footer)**
- **Text**: "9h - 18h" (9 AM - 6 PM) centered in white, indicating business hours.

#### **b. Pink Bar (Middle Footer)**
- **Text**: Repeated "9h - 18h" (9 AM - 6 PM) in white, spaced evenly (likely a design element or repeated hours).

#### **c. Dark Gray Bar (Bottom Footer)**
- **Text**: "Fermé" (Closed) in white, centered (possibly indicating a holiday or closed status).

#### **d. Contact Info Section (White Background)**
- **Three Columns** (icons + text):
  - **Address**: 
    - Icon: White location pin (📍)
    - Text: "ADRESSE" (Address) in white, followed by "19 Boulevard Farreng 13016 Marseille" (street address).
  - **Phone**: 
    - Icon: White phone (📞)
    - Text: "TÉLÉPHONE" (Phone) in white, followed by "07 84 82 71 91" (phone number).
  - **Email**: 
    - Icon: White envelope (✉️)
    - Text: "E-MAIL" in white, followed by "tiffinart13016@gmail.com" (email address).

#### **e. Logo & Links (White Background)**
- **Logo**: Centered red "TIFINART" logo with the tagline "Agence de pub et communication visuelle" in gray.
- **Address**: "19 Boulevard Farreng, 13016 Marseille" (repeated) in gray.
- **Contact Info**: "07 84 82 71 91 | tiffinart13016@gmail.com" in gray.
- **"Plan du site" Link**: Gray text ("Site Map") centered below.

#### **f. Footer Links (White Background)**
- **Main Links** (black text, spaced evenly):
  - Accueil (Home)
  - Enseigne de magasin (Store Sign)
  - Enseigne lumineuse (Lighted Sign)
  - Enseigne sur mesure (Custom Sign)
  - Enseigne drapeau (Flag Sign)
  - Promotions
  - Aménagement (Layout)
  - Plaques professionnelles (Professional Plates)
  - Store
  - Covering
  - Contact

- **Service Links** (red text, in two rows):
  - Top row: "Création d’enseigne" (Sign Creation), "Installation store de restaurant" (Restaurant Store Installation), "Enseigne de magasin" (Store Sign), "Covering mural" (Wall Wrap)
  - Bottom row: "Enseigne lumineuse" (Lighted Sign), "Covering véhicule" (Vehicle Wrap), "Enseigne sur mesure" (Custom Sign), "Covering commerce" (Commercial Wrap), "Enseigne drapeau" (Flag Sign), "Aménagement de stand" (Booth Layout), "Création plaque professionnelle" (Professional Plate Creation), "Création store de magasin" (Store Sign Creation), "Installation store de magasin" (Store Sign Installation)


### **7. Additional Visual Elements**
- **Scroll-to-Top Button**: Red upward arrow (↑) icon on the bottom-right corner of the page (visible when scrolling).
- **Background Colors**: The page uses a consistent color scheme of red (for headers, buttons, and accents), white (for main content), gray (for text and borders), and pink (for a footer section), creating a clean, professional look.


### Summary of Key Content
- **Services**: Signage (enseignes), wraps (covering), visual communication, store design, professional plates, promotions.
- **Location**: Marseille and Bouches-du-Rhône.
- **Contact**: Phone (07 84 82 71 91), email (tiffinart13016@gmail.com), address (19 Boulevard Farreng, 13016 Marseille).
- **Reviews**: 5.0/5 stars on Google (34 reviews) with snippets and "Read More" links.
- **Navigation**: Clear menu with links to all services and contact info.
- **Design**: Professional, with a focus on visual communication (signage, wraps) and local business visibility.
